The '''8-2A medical bundle''' was a hand-held [[Medpac/Legends|medical kit]] carried as part of a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi's]] field kit during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].

This medical bundle featured multiple reservoirs of [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]], allowing a Jedi to temporarily treat potentially mortal wounds during missions or on the battlefield.<ref name="POTJ">{{HasbroCite|set=Star Wars: Power of the Jedi|pack=Obi-Wan Kenobi (Jedi Training Gear)|altlink=https://www.rebelscum.com/POTJobiwanjt.asp}}</ref>
